calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-06-2011 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-11-2011 Continued To Jul-06-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Milton Katz for the Personal Representative.

Mr. Katz stated that he received the Examiner's notes from January 31st, that he called the Probate Examiner saying that he forgot to send notice to the Department of Health Care Services, that he requested a continuance, that he never heard back from the Examiner and that he assumed the matter was taken off calendar. In addition, Mr. Katz stated that the four month period regarding Creditor's Claims was now up, that he could now file an amended petition for final distribution, that he would do whatever is necessary and requested a continunace. The matter was continued to July 6, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of filing of the amended petition. The Court directed Counsel to review the Court's website to check status of matters on calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
